primary_sources.title: Federal Constitution of Malaysia, Part IV (The Federation), Articles 32, 33, 34, 35, 38, 40, 42, 150, 181
Federal Constitution Third Schedule (Election of Yang di-Pertuan Agong)

notes: Constitutional monarch elected every five years from among nine hereditary Malay Rulers per Third Schedule. Powers: act on advice (Article 40), discretionary in appointment of PM (Article 40(2)), pardon (Article 42), Emergency proclamation (Article 150). Conference of Rulers is a separate institutional body co-located legitimacy-wise. Active interventions documented: 2009 Perak, 2018 PM transition, 2020 Sheraton, 2021 Emergency, 2022 hung-parliament PM selection, 2024 Najib home detention.
